## Summary

Describe the mathematical or infrastructure change and its motivation.

## Verification

- [ ] `lake build`
- [ ] `lake lint`
- [ ] `lake test`
- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] No `sorry` or `admit` was introduced
- [ ] Public declarations and non-obvious design choices are documented
- [ ] Relevant notes, milestones, and tests were updated

## Mathematical dependencies

List the definitions, references, or earlier milestones on which this change depends.
